title: Supernova Empires Dark Mode
description: This resource pack is made for Supernova Empires but can be used on vanilla or a lot of modpacks. This will turn every vanilla GUI Dark.
body:
This resource pack wiil turn every GUI dark, made especially for Supernova Empires, but can be used in vanilla Minecraft or any other modpack. Now it only supports vanilla UI's but will suport some mods too in the future.

## Mod Support:

- Actually Additions
- Applied Energistics 2
- Better Advancements
- Big Reactors
- Crafting Tweaks
- Create
- Curios
- EnderIO
- Extended Crafting
- Extreme Reactors
- Iron Furnaces
- Jei Resources
- Just Enough Professions
- Mod Menu
- No Chat Reports
- Polymorph
- Rechiseled
- RFTools
- SecurityCraft
- Tom's Storage
- Travelers Backpack
- Xnet
